commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Then Moab rebelled against Israel after the death of Ahab. Rebelled: literally, "prevaricated. "(Haydock) The kings of Israel kept some of the nations, which David had conquered, in subjection, while the kings of Juda ruled over the others. In consequence of the late disaster, these people began to throw off the yoke. (Tirinus) Joram made war upon Moab, chap. God began to punish the house of Achab, by these means. (Calmet) The Moabites refused to pay tribute, (Menochius) as the Israelites would not acknowledge the divine authority.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Ochozias sendeth to consult Beelzebub: Elias foretelleth his death: and causeth fire to come down from heaven, upon two captains and their companies.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
